ieee_requirement: The desktop client shall display information regarding data privacy notices to attendees signing in to a Zoom account.

The Software **shall** provide users with the capability to authenticate and sign in to a Zoom account by submitting authentication information via either the desktop client or the mobile application.
The desktop client shall provide users with the ability to sign in to their profile.
The mobile application shall authenticate participants to sign in to a Zoom account via either the desktop client or the mobile application.
The web portal shall provide users with the capability to change their account email domain, supporting both client-side and application-level authentication mechanisms.
The desktop client shall provide the capability for a user to switch their account profile within the web portal prior to joining a session via a join URL.
The mobile application shall provide the signed-in user with access to educational content that requires specific authentication.
The desktop client shall provide authenticated access to the panelist web portal for users joining via the join URL.
The System shall provide users with the capability to authenticate using email domains that require specific authentication methods.
The desktop client shall provide users with the ability to authenticate without prior registration to join a webinar.
The system shall support single sign-on authentication for user accounts associated with specified email domains.
The mobile application shall provide the user with the capability to submit information that satisfies host-defined authentication requirements.
The Web Portal **shall** provide the capability for users to transition the signed-in status of account participants' desktop clients or mobile applications to a specified Zoom account.
The mobile application **shall** provide the user with the capability to switch account information for a signed-in Zoom account between the desktop client and the mobile application.
The Web Portal **shall** provide users with the capability to input information regarding email domains and meetings/webinars hosted by the associated account.
The Software shall provide the capability for users to pass an authentication check, enabling attendees to sign into a Zoom account.

The web portal shall provide users with the capability to be signed in to their profile, and this authentication shall be synchronized with the desktop client or mobile application for access to a Zoom account.
The desktop client and mobile application shall provide users with the capability to sign in to Zoom accounts and acknowledge data privacy notices.
The software shall provide registrants with the capability to view, save, and share information prior to submission.
The mobile application shall provide users with the ability to sign in. Session hosts shall require specific authentication.
The web portal shall authenticate users who join through a join URL by presenting them with a sign-in interface for their authentication profile.
The System **shall** enable users to provide information that meets the requirements of the web portal when joining a meeting via a join URL.
The System shall provide the capability for users to join a webinar without prior registration.
The Software System **shall** provide users with the capability to sign in information that is synchronized across multiple user devices.
The mobile application shall provide users with the ability to select an authentication method.
The desktop client shall provide the capability for users to pass authentication by verifying email domains when joining through a web portal join URL.
The mobile application shall allow users to sign in to a Zoom account, enabling their profile to be active on both the desktop client and the mobile application concurrently.
The desktop client shall implement an authentication mechanism that verifies user identity prior to enabling access to view, save, and share information.
The mobile application shall provide a mechanism for authorized users to input participant information for webinar attendance without prior registration.
The web portal shall allow authorized users to sign in using email domains associated with specific reactions.
The desktop client shall provide users with the ability to be signed in to their profile, and shall present data privacy notices to users who are signed in to Zoom.
The client shall provide the user with the capability to enable the theme by default.
The system shall provide the capability for users to enable automatic light adaptation.
The client settings shall provide the user with the capability to control light adaptation.
The software shall provide a user interface that allows the user to select an automatic adjustment for low light video setting.
The client shall provide a mechanism for users to select an "Adjust for low light" video setting.
The client settings shall provide a mechanism for the user to select a slider control.
The client settings shall provide the user with the ability to select light adaptation.
The software shall provide the user with the ability to control the theme within the video settings.
The client Settings shall provide the user with the capability to enable brightness by default.
The client shall provide the capability for the user to select an automatic adjustment for low-light video setting.
The software shall provide a user interface element that allows the user to configure client settings. This configuration shall include an option to enable dark mode by default.
The client Settings shall provide the user with the capability to enable light adaptation, with selectable modes of Auto and Manual.
The client Settings shall provide the user with the capability to control dark mode selection via a slider control.
The system **shall** provide the user with the capability to set the video brightness to either Automatic or Manual mode.
The Software Configuration shall provide the capability to enable light adaptation for low-light compensation.
The client Settings shall provide the user with the capability to enable dark mode. Dark mode shall be enabled by default.
The Software System shall provide the capability for the User to control the display brightness. This capability shall be disabled by default.
The Client Settings shall provide the user with the ability to control the display brightness in Auto or Manual modes.
The client settings shall provide the user with the ability to select a dark mode option, which shall be dependent on the state of the EnableLightAdaption setting.
The client Settings shall provide the user with the ability to control the theme, which shall be dependent on the state of EnableLightAdaption.
The software shall provide the capability for users to control brightness, which shall be dependent on the state of the EnableLightAdaption function.
The system shall provide the user with the capability to control theme selection automatically.
The client settings shall provide the user with the ability to enable or disable dark mode. Dark mode shall be disabled by default.
The client Settings shall provide the user with the ability to adjust the low-light compensation level.
The client settings shall provide the user with the capability to enable light adaptation, which shall be enabled by default.
The software **shall** provide a user interface element that enables the user to select the video setting between "Auto" and "Manual" using a slider control.

The System **shall** provide the capability for a participant to join a meeting via a Uniform Resource Locator (URL) that links to the poll results of a third-party survey, with such results being accessible to alternative hosts of the meeting.
The software system shall provide users with the capability to add polls for Zoom-enabled participants.
The software system shall provide users with the capability to add alternative hosts via a CSV poll report enabled by Zoom.
The System **shall** provide users with the ability to initiate the download of survey data.
The Software Component shall provide the capability for users to download poll results, including question and answer types.
The software system shall provide the user with the ability to view advanced polls and additional in-meeting options within the Dashboard.

The software system shall provide the capability for users to add alternative hosts. Upon initiation of the post-meeting survey, the software system shall commence the download of the CSV poll report.
The system **shall** provide users with the ability to enable a waiting room feature for all meetings and webinars, which will be enforced starting November 7, 2021.
The software system **shall** prompt the user for survey settings, specifically for the "Post meeting feedback survey" version 5.8.3 or higher.
The software system **shall** allow the user to initiate the download of the CSV poll report only after the meeting or webinar has concluded and the post-meeting survey has begun.
The system shall provide alternative hosts the ability to display an end-of-meeting feedback survey.
The System **shall** provide the capability for users to download the complete poll results in spreadsheet format via the native Zoom survey tools.
The software system **shall** provide users with the ability to specify an alternative Uniform Resource Locator (URL) for linking to a third-party survey.
The software system shall permit authorized users to create advanced polls, with participants having the capability to include images.
The system **shall** provide users with the ability to edit polls and enable the end-of-meeting feedback survey for all users.
The software system shall provide users with the ability to link to a third-party survey service, provided that the service is at version 5.8.3 or higher.
The System **shall** allow users to provide feedback at the end of a meeting by utilizing a link to a third-party survey, integrated with the native Zoom survey tools.
The software system shall allow authorized users to designate alternative participants to receive meeting information following the meeting's conclusion.
The software system shall provide users with the ability to construct advanced polls for alternative hosts on version 5.8.3 or higher.
The software system shall provide the capability for authorized users to download participant data as a spreadsheet if the "Post meeting feedback survey" setting is enabled.

The software system shall provide a mechanism for users to input a Uniform Resource Locator (URL) referencing a third-party survey's CSV poll report, enabling subsequent modifications to the data contained within that report.
The Software System **shall** permit a webinar host to edit polls enabled via Zoom.
The software system shall provide the capability for users to add polls within a meeting and automatically record poll responses.
The software shall provide the user with the ability to view alternative hosts for meetings within the Dashboard, categorized by question/answer types.
The Software Component shall provide authorized users the capability to designate alternative hosts for meetings. This capability shall be available when using Dashboard version 5.8.3 or higher.
The Dashboard shall display answers that contain multiple question/answer types, ranked by relevance.
The Software System shall provide the capability for the end-of-meeting feedback survey to be displayed in the Dashboard.
The software system **shall** allow authorized users to add alternative hosts for Zoom-enabled participants.
The software system shall provide the capability for users to initiate the download of third-party survey alternative hosts for their meetings.
The software system shall provide users with the capability to integrate third-party survey feedback via a link utilizing native Zoom survey tools.
The software system shall provide users with the capability to construct advanced polls for meetings or webinars if the "Post meeting feedback survey" setting is enabled.
The system shall provide the user with the capability to initiate a download of meeting or webinar attendance data in spreadsheet format prior to the conclusion of the meeting or webinar.

The System **shall** provide a mechanism to integrate with third-party survey platforms via a provided link. This integration **shall** support the display and submission of survey responses encompassing multiple question and answer types.
The Software System **shall** allow users to join a live session via a Uniform Resource Locator (URL) that directs to a third-party survey containing multiple question and answer types.
The System **shall** provide users with the ability to provide additional feedback via a CSV poll report, enabled for all users on November 7, 2021.
The Software System **shall** provide users with the capability to edit polls, enabling the ranking of answers and supporting multiple question and answer types.
The software system shall permit authorized users to enable alternative hosts to poll Zoom results.
The software system shall provide a mechanism for authorized users to download the complete results of the post-meeting feedback survey upon the conclusion of the poll during a live session.
The software system shall provide users with the capability to add poll participants and alternative hosts to their meetings.
The software system shall allow a user with host privileges to join scheduling, and shall present the host with options to either leave or end the meeting.
The software system shall display master/sub-account information when the Leave button is activated, provided the co-host feature is disabled.
The software system shall provide users with the ability to rejoin the co-host feature upon successful completion of a backend server update.
The Software System shall permit a user with Master Account privileges to assign scheduling privileges to a Normal Participant within a linked Master/Sub Account structure.
The software system shall enable users to assign a new host to a participant currently scheduled for November 14, 2021.
The software system shall permit a user with co-host privileges to remove another user from the meeting.
The software system shall provide the capability for users to rejoin master/sub accounts when the co-host feature is enabled for a meeting.
The Software System **shall** provide users with the ability to reclaim host controls. Sub-accounts **shall** be displayed.
The software system shall permit a user to join account-level settings when the co-host feature is disabled.
The software system shall provide authorized users with the capability to transition a sub-account to a normal participant status.
The software system shall display the "Leave" button for normal participants.
The software system shall enable users to regain control of linked master/subordinate accounts.

The software system shall allow authorized users to change their assigned role within a meeting. Upon role change, the system shall ensure the user regains full control commensurate with their new role.
The software system shall permit users to retain participant scheduling privileges, subject to backend server update status.

The software system **shall** provide users with the ability to assign a new host. Upon assignment, the system **shall** prompt the departing host to confirm whether they wish to leave or end the meeting.
The software system **shall** provide a mechanism for authorized users to designate alternative co-hosts for events scheduled on November 14, 2021.
The software system **shall** provide users with the ability to reclaim host controls, and scheduling privileges **shall** be displayed.
The software system shall provide users with the capability to reclaim host controls, thereby preventing disruption to the current host.
The software system shall enable authorized users to regain control of master and sub accounts belonging to the same organization.
The software system shall permit the current host to assign a new host without interrupting ongoing operations.
The software system **shall** allow a user to link a sub-account to a master account.
The software system shall provide the capability for users to reclaim host controls for master and sub-accounts, including any users assigned to those master or sub-accounts.
The Software System **shall** provide the capability for users to join scheduling privileges, contingent upon a backend server update.
The software system **shall** allow authorized users to assign a new host master account with a version of 5.8.3 or higher.
The software system **shall** maintain a user's participant scheduling privilege status, which is dependent on backend server updates.
The software system shall provide the user with the capability to exit the meeting as a normal participant, inclusive of users belonging to sub-accounts and the master account.
The software system shall provide the user with the ability to regain control of account-level settings.

The software system shall provide the user with the capability to leave or end a meeting. Control of the meeting shall be automatically restored to the host upon the user leaving or ending the meeting.
The software system shall revert a user to normal participant status when the co-host feature is disabled.
The software system **shall** provide users the ability to display the co-host feature based on a backend server update.
The software system shall allow a user to join a master account without disrupting the current host session.
The software system shall enable users to regain control of account-level settings that are currently scheduled for November 14, 2021.
The software system **shall** provide users with the capability to link sub-accounts to a master account without disrupting the functionality of the current host account.
The software system shall provide users with the ability to assign a new host.
The software system shall provide users with the ability to assign scheduling privileges via a non-disruptive pop-up message.
The desktop client shall present an installation wizard to the user upon initial launch.
The desktop client shall provide users with the ability to install updates, which may be initiated through MSI, GPO, or PLIST deployment mechanisms.
The desktop client shall provide the capability for users to remove MSI, GPO, or PLIST options only when the existing AutoUpdate option is enabled.
The desktop client shall provide the capability to remove the MSI/GPO/PLIST option when this option is enabled.
The desktop client shall provide users with the ability to check for and install updates via MSI, GPO, or PLIST deployment mechanisms.
The desktop client shall provide the capability for a user to remove the MSI/GPO/PLIST option when it is in a disabled state.
The desktop client shall provide the capability to remove the MSI/GPO/PLIST option that enables update checking.
The desktop client shall provide the user with the capability to remove the installation wizard when it is disabled.
The desktop client shall provide the capability for a user to remove an installed wizard when that wizard is in a disabled state.
The desktop client **shall** provide the user with the ability to install the installation wizard if it is disabled.
The desktop client shall provide the capability to suppress the display of the installation wizard upon initial launch.
The desktop client **shall** provide a mechanism for users to silently check for updates and remove the install wizard.
The desktop client shall provide users the ability to install the installation wizard. The installation wizard shall be disabled by default in the MSI package.
The desktop client shall provide the capability to check for updates via an installation wizard.
The desktop client shall provide the capability for the user to uninstall the installation wizard when this option is enabled.
The desktop client shall provide users the capability to remove the installation wizard
The desktop client shall provide the capability to remove the installation wizard. The desktop client shall allow users to check for and install updates.
The desktop client shall provide a silent update check removal option for MSI, GPO, and PLIST configurations.
The desktop client shall provide users with the ability to install MSI, GPO, or PLIST options; installation failure shall be indicated.
The desktop client shall provide the capability for users to enable the MSI/GPO/PLIST option.
The desktop client shall provide the capability for the installation wizard to silently check for updates.
The desktop client **shall** provide users with the ability to install the software. The installation wizard **shall** require the existing AutoUpdate option to be enabled for installation.
The application **shall** provide users with the ability to send messages to the backstage area during the webinar.
The System **shall** provide a mechanism to enable live webinar visibility to the Host, Panelists, and Attendees.
The Software System **shall** display group-visible information and audible to all attendees.
The application shall provide the user with an auditory notification for chat messages not visible or audible to other attendees.
The software system shall provide users with the capability to request reactions without requiring verbal or chat-based communication with the host.
The software shall provide users with the capability to display a chat window in the bottom-right corner of the meeting interface.
The system shall provide the capability to move Live Transcription such that its visibility is controllable by the host, panelists, and attendees.
The Software System **shall** provide a mechanism for authorized users to request that a panelist respond anonymously.
The software system shall provide the user with the capability to rejoin the live transcription session via a control located in the bottom-right corner of the display.
The software system shall allow authorized users to send messages to the backstage area without interrupting the host, via either verbal commands or chat input.
The Zoom Events system shall provide a mechanism for users to request that panelists be visible to the host, panelists, and attendees.
The application shall provide users with the ability to create and manage private groups, where content and interactions within these groups are not visible or audible to other attendees.
The application shall provide attendees the ability to modify user-level settings that are audible and visible to them.
The Software Configuration Management system shall provide users with the capability to view and transmit live reactions within the webinar environment.
The application **shall** provide a mechanism for users to enable access to a backstage area, which **shall** allow them to send and view reactions.
The application shall provide the capability for users to view the presentation content visible to the host, panelists, and attendees.
The zoom settings shall provide the user with the capability to enable dark mode. Dark mode shall be enabled by default.
The system shall allow users to rejoin User-level settings at the Account, Group, and User levels.
The software system shall display the Account status visible to the host, panelists, and attendees.
The software system **shall** provide a mechanism for users to engage in private chat sessions not observable or audible by other attendees.
The Software System **shall** provide a backstage area that is visible to the host, panelists, and attendees.
The Application **shall** provide a user interface element enabling users to request access to the backstage area. This element **shall** be located in the bottom-right corner of the display.
The software system shall provide a mechanism for users to transmit chat messages that are visible to and audible by all authenticated attendees of a session.
The application shall provide the capability for users to anonymously view reactions.
The application shall provide the user with the capability to display group reactions similar to those in meeting contexts.
The meeting shall provide users the capability to prevent the Live Transcription from being obscured or interrupted by other user interface elements in the bottom-right corner.
The application **shall** provide users with the capability to send live webinar communications that are visible to the host, panelists, and attendees.
The software system shall provide the capability for a user to request that a presentation be displayed in the bottom-right corner of the user interface.
The Software **shall** provide a mechanism for authorized users to request user-level settings that are visible to and audible by attendees.
The Software System **shall** provide the capability for authorized users to configure settings at the Account-, Group-, and User-levels to prevent interruption of live webinars.
The Application **shall** provide the User with the capability to prevent interruption of the presentation during a webinar.
The Zoom Events System **shall** provide the user with an interface element, labeled "Account", located in the bottom-right corner of the display.
The application shall provide users with the capability to view and hear a stream of submitted reactions visible to and audible by attendees.
The System **shall** provide a mechanism for users to enable anonymous participation in the main webinar window.
The software system shall provide users with the capability to request a presentation, send reactions to it, and view reactions from other users.
The software system **shall** allow authorized users to request access to the backstage area at the account, group, and user levels.

The system shall provide users with the ability to perform image searches, and the search results shall allow for the direct selection of a person within a channel's information panel, located directly below the "Add Members" option.
The system shall provide users with the ability to return thumbnail previews for image search. Desktop users shall be able to filter file search results by Order, Sent by, and date.

The image search function **shall** provide the user with the ability to:
1. View a history of recent searches.
2. Clear the list of recent searches.

The system **shall** provide the capability to perform an image search. The system **shall** allow users to view all image search results. The system **shall** enable users to filter image search results to display only those images associated with starred messages.

The image search shall provide users with the ability to navigate forward. A person shall also be selectable directly within that channel’s information panel, positioned directly below the "Add Members" option.
The chat message system **shall** provide users with the ability to filter file search results. The filtering options **shall** include: Order, Sent by, and Date.
The software shall provide functionality to search for files within specific chat channels. Desktop users shall be able to filter search results by Order, Sender, and Date.
The system **shall** provide users with the capability to return chat message search results. Mobile users **shall** be able to filter file search results by order.
The system shall provide users with the ability to view a history of chat messages. Messages containing mentions shall be displayed as thumbnail previews.
The chat channel **shall** provide users with the ability to tag a specific chat channel.
The chat channel shall provide users with the ability to add members and view the history of added members.

The Software Requirements Specification shall provide users with the capability to search through channel and contact results. Desktop users shall be able to filter file search results by order, sender, and date.

The system **shall** provide the capability for users to filter image search results to include only starred messages.
The system **shall** allow users to search within their starred messages.
The chat channel shall provide users with the ability to filter image search results for desktop users by Order, Sent By, and Date.

The system **shall** provide a mechanism for users to tag a previously accessed channel. This tag **shall** restrict search results within that channel to only include items mentioning the user performing the search.
The system shall provide the capability to search within a specified chat channel, displaying search results as thumbnail previews.
The chat channel **shall** provide users with the capability to search for strings of characters. Desktop users **shall** be able to filter file searches by Order, Sent by, and date.
The software shall provide a mechanism to display a history of starred messages when a channel is tagged within a chat message.
The chat message function shall provide the capability to filter individuals when tagging a participant in a channel.
The System **shall** provide users with the capability to select a search type, which **shall** include a person search. The person search **shall** allow users to input any string of characters.
The Software System **shall** provide users with the ability to perform image searches. The results of an urgent request **shall** be displayed as thumbnail previews.
The chat channel shall allow users to include their own categories, which shall be selectable directly within the channel's information panel, positioned immediately below the "Add Members" control.
The chat channel shall provide users the capability to tag all image search results by specifying any string of characters.
The system shall provide the capability to filter image search results to include only those containing mentions of the logged-in user.

The image search shall provide the capability for users to search within all returned image search results. Users shall be able to search through their starred messages, or filter a search to include only starred messages.

The software shall provide users with the capability to search within images. Image search shall also be selectable directly within a channel's information panel, located below the "Add Members" option.
The system **shall** provide users with the capability to filter image search results by a narrowed string of characters. Mobile users **shall** be able to filter file search results by order.
The system shall provide users with the ability to search for urgent requests, and the search results shall be displayed as thumbnail previews.
The file search shall provide users with the ability to view a search history. A user shall be selectable directly from the channel's information panel, positioned below the "Add Members" control.
The software **shall** provide a mechanism to display a history of recent file searches. The user **shall** be able to initiate a new file search by entering any string of characters.
The System **shall** provide users with the capability to search chat messages. The System **shall** allow users to filter search results to include only starred messages.
The system shall provide the capability for users to filter search results to include only starred messages.
The chat channel **shall** provide the capability for a user to filter image search results to include only those containing mentions of the user performing the search.
The chat channel shall provide users with the ability to perform a narrowed file search and to navigate forward in search results.
The system shall provide the capability to search within specific chat channels.
The system **shall** provide the capability for users to filter their search history to include only results containing mentions of the user performing the search.
The chat message function shall provide users with the ability to navigate forward through messages. Starred messages shall be displayed as thumbnail previews.

The system shall provide a mechanism for users to search for and tag previously active channels. Upon selecting a tagged channel, the system shall allow the user to navigate to it. The system shall also provide functionality to quickly return the user to the last active channel prior to the current one without requiring a search.
The system shall provide the capability to respond to starred messages by tagging a channel within a chat message.
The system **shall** provide the user with the ability to select urgent search requests and to clear the list of recent searches.

The system **shall** provide a mechanism to momentarily display the channel information panel in response to an urgent request or message. Upon dismissing the panel, the system **shall** automatically return the user to the previously active channel without requiring a subsequent search.
The system shall provide the capability for a user to disable the display of images within the in-meeting chat interface.
The system shall provide the capability for users to prevent file sharing when a file download attempt fails.
The system **shall** provide the capability to receive Zoom Whiteboard files within the meeting chat feature.
The system shall provide the capability for users to limit the transmission or playback of audio messages across all associated devices.
The Software System **shall** provide the capability for users to upload files to the meeting chat.
Zoom Cloud shall display the size of transferred files for unread messages.
The System **shall** provide users with the capability to limit the synchronization of Zoom Whiteboard files across devices.
The Software Component **shall** provide the capability to receive files transferred via the meeting chat feature.
The system shall provide the capability for administrators to re-enable in-meeting chat for third-party users.
The system **shall** provide the capability for users to restrict the transfer of files to third-party cloud storage services.
The System **shall** provide a mechanism for users to mark transferred documents as unread.
Google Workspace Docs shall provide users with the capability to re-enable file size visibility across devices.
The system shall provide users with the capability to download file sizes directly from cloud storage within chat channels.
The Software Unit shall provide the capability for authorized users to re-enable a disabled meeting chat channel.
The system shall enable users to initiate direct file transfers within the in-meeting chat interface.
The Software **shall** provide users with the ability to transfer default Instant Messaging chat sessions.
The system shall provide a mechanism for users to receive documents when a download attempt fails.
The system shall enable users to receive chat messages created during an active meeting.
The System **shall** provide users the capability to download screenshots from SharePoint.
The software shall provide functionality to enable users to transfer documents between devices.
The System **shall** provide the capability for authorized users to re-enable the file storage option for Microsoft SharePoint.
The Office 365 system shall provide a mechanism to disable the saving of Zoom Whiteboard files to Microsoft SharePoint.
The Software System shall provide users the capability to designate shared files as unread.
The System **shall** provide a mechanism for users to mark push notifications as default.
The system shall provide users with the capability to transfer audio messages between devices.
The System **shall** provide the capability for users to upload Zoom Whiteboard files, and these uploaded files **shall** be presented to the user in an unread state.
The Software shall provide the capability to receive images from Microsoft SharePoint.
The System **shall** enable users to receive screenshots across their registered devices.
The system shall provide users the capability to transfer file ownership.
The Software **shall** provide users with the capability to download file storage options directly through the in-meeting chat interface.
The system shall provide the capability for users to receive images while the image functionality remains disabled.
The System shall provide the capability for users to receive instant messages from newly created chat sessions.
The System **shall** provide the capability for the user to initiate file transfer of newly created Box Notes.
The meeting platform shall provide the capability to collapse all saved configurations to the main session.
The meeting platform **shall** provide users with the ability to remove the whiteboard while present in a Breakout Room.
The meeting platform shall provide the capability to expand all participant assignments prior to meeting entry.
The meeting platform **shall** provide users with the capability to save multi-page whiteboards. The platform **shall** also enable participants to self-select their desired breakout room.
The meeting platform **shall** enable administrators to move participants to breakout sessions when the Information Barrier feature is enabled.
The meeting platform shall enable the assignment of participants from the main session to breakout rooms.
The meeting platform shall allow authorized users to freely navigate between assigned breakout rooms.
The meeting platform shall permit participants to join breakout rooms after they have been initiated.

The meeting platform shall provide participants with the ability to move freely between breakout rooms. If breakout room pre-assignments are active, the system shall prompt participants to join their pre-assigned breakout rooms. Otherwise, the host shall have the capability to assign participants directly to a breakout room.
The meeting platform **shall** provide users with the capability to create desired breakout rooms for future use.

The meeting platform shall provide the capability to automatically assign participants to breakout sessions. When automatic assignment is selected during breakout room creation, co-hosts shall not be automatically assigned to breakout sessions, but the host shall have the option to include them.

The meeting platform **shall** provide users with the ability to rename meeting participants via a broadcast message. This functionality **shall** be available only for recurring meetings and **shall** be limited to a maximum of ten saved configurations per user.

The meeting platform shall provide users with the ability to assign participants to a waiting room. If the waiting room is prepared by a co-host, participants shall remain in the waiting room upon the host joining the meeting.
The meeting platform shall provide the capability for users to collapse all main sessions. Main sessions shall not be required to be closed to rename or add/remove additional rooms.

The meeting platform shall provide users with the ability to join breakout rooms after they have been started. When creating breakout rooms and selecting automatic participant assignment, co-hosts shall not be automatically assigned to breakout rooms but may be explicitly included by the host.
The meeting platform shall provide the capability to collapse all sharing within breakout sessions on the account.
The meeting platform shall provide the capability for authorized users to rename participants within an active Breakout Room.

The meeting platform **shall** allow users to move participants' annotations when the Information Barrier feature is enabled, supporting the use of breakout sessions while preventing unauthorized sensitive data sharing.
The meeting platform shall provide the capability for designated meeting hosts to include co-hosts authorized to access sensitive data within the meeting.
The meeting platform shall allow users to freely move between breakout rooms. Recurring meetings prepared by a co-host shall not be lost when the host joins.
The meeting platform shall automatically assign participants from the Waiting Room.

The meeting platform shall provide users with the ability to self-select their assigned breakout room. The Information Barrier enhancement shall allow a participant to be reassigned to the main session instead of terminating all breakout sessions.
The meeting platform shall provide the capability for authorized users to rename meeting participants' annotations while within a Breakout Room.
The meeting platform **shall** enable meeting hosts to move freely between breakout rooms during their configuration.
The meeting platform shall enable the assignment of previously saved configurations to meeting hosts.
The meeting platform **shall** provide users the ability to save a multi-page whiteboard for co-hosts whose settings/restrictions differ from the main session.
The meeting platform **shall** provide users with the ability to create an Information Barrier enhancement for all active Breakout Rooms.

The meeting platform **shall** provide users with the ability to join sessions after Breakout Rooms have been started. The user **shall** have the option to assign a participant back to the main session, rather than ending all breakout sessions.

The meeting platform shall provide the capability for users to save multi-page whiteboard sharing within breakout sessions without requiring the session to be closed to rename or add/remove additional rooms.
